title: Topology Query Nodes
description: Implement 8 mesh topology query nodes that leverage the half-edge data structure for O(1) adjacency lookups. These nodes expose the mesh's topological structure to the node graph for selection and analysis. CornersOfFace: get corner indices of a face. EdgesOfCorner: get edges meeting at a corner. FaceOfCorner: get the face containing a corner. VertexOfCorner: get the vertex at a corner. InputMeshEdgeAngle: dihedral angle between two faces sharing an edge. InputMeshEdgeNeighbors: count of faces sharing an edge. InputMeshEdgeVertices: get the two vertices of an edge. InputMeshVertexNeighbors: count of edges/faces connected to a vertex.
definition-of-done: 1. Eight node classes in nodes/topology/. 2. All queries run in O(1) or O(neighbors) using half-edge traversal. 3. InputMeshEdgeAngle computes correct dihedral angle in radians. 4. InputMeshEdgeNeighbors returns 2 for interior edges, 1 for boundary edges. 5. InputMeshVertexNeighbors returns correct valence. 6. All corner-related nodes correctly map between corner indices and faces/vertices/edges.
testing-plan: 1. On a cube: InputMeshEdgeAngle on an edge between two faces, verify 90 degrees. 2. InputMeshEdgeNeighbors on interior cube edge: verify 2. On boundary edge of a plane: verify 1. 3. InputMeshVertexNeighbors on a cube corner: verify 3 edges. 4. CornersOfFace on a triangle: verify 3 corners. 5. VertexOfCorner and FaceOfCorner round-trip consistency.
todos: Implement InputMeshEdgeAngleNode using face normal dot product
unknowns: Whether 'corner' should be a first-class element in the half-edge mesh or derived from half-edges at query time
